name: Framer
longDescription:
Framer is a no-code website builder aimed at designers and small teams. It combines a visual canvas similar to design tools with a publishing engine, so the artboard you arrange on screen is the same one that ships to production. Layouts use auto-layout and breakpoints to adapt cleanly across desktop, tablet, and mobile.

The product is geared toward marketing sites, landing pages, portfolios, and content-led sites, with a built-in CMS for collections like blog posts and case studies. Animations, interactions, and effects are configured visually rather than written in code.

Framer hosts the published sites on its own infrastructure with a global CDN, custom domains, SSL, and analytics. It also supports custom code and React-based components for teams that need to extend the visual editor with their own logic.

features.title: Visual website builder
features.description: Design and publish responsive sites on a canvas without writing HTML or CSS.

features.title: Built-in CMS
features.description: Manage collections like posts and case studies and bind them to designed templates.

features.title: Animations and effects
features.description: Add scroll, hover, and page transitions visually with fine-grained timing controls.

features.title: Responsive breakpoints
features.description: Tune layouts per screen size while keeping a single source of truth for the page.

features.title: Hosting and domains
features.description: Sites are published on Framer's CDN with custom domains, SSL, and basic analytics included.

useCases: Shipping a marketing site for a startup without engineers
Building a personal portfolio with case studies and animations
Designing and publishing a launch landing page in a single tool
Maintaining a content-driven site through a built-in CMS

faq.question: Is Framer free?
faq.answer: Framer has a free tier with a Framer-branded subdomain; paid plans add custom domains, more pages, and CMS capacity.

faq.question: Can I use a custom domain?
faq.answer: Yes, custom domains with SSL are supported on paid plans.

faq.question: Do I need to know how to code?
faq.answer: No, Framer is built for non-developers, though custom code components are supported for advanced needs.

faq.question: Where are Framer sites hosted?
faq.answer: Framer hosts published sites on its own global CDN; you do not need a separate hosting provider.
